global_brief: 过去24小时的重要动态主要集中在：OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy；OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens；Agentifying Patient Dynamics within LLMs through Interacting with Clinical World Model。

highlight_facts.title: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy
highlight_facts.summary: OpenAI co-founder Greg Brockman takes charge of product strategy；OpenAI's latest shakeup comes as the company reportedly plans to combine ChatGPT and its programming product Codex.；IT之家 5 月 16 日消息，就在刚刚，周六早上的科技圈又曝出重磅消息。…
